title: der_to_fixed_rs: UB on unexpected r_len/s_len from wolfCrypt
description: ecdsa_native.rs der_to_fixed_rs computes FIELD_SIZE - r_len as usize with no bounds check. If wolfCrypt returns r_len > FIELD_SIZE (e.g. corrupted key, C library bug, future API change), the subtraction wraps to a huge usize in release builds and the subsequent copy_from_slice causes undefined behavior. In debug it panics. Fix: bounds-check r_len and s_len against FIELD_SIZE before the arithmetic and return Err(WolfCryptError::Ffi{...}) if out of range. Review note: 15-20% estimated probability that r_len==0 or s_len==0 (maximum leading-zero strip) is not exercised by current tests.
